feedback: Maya from customer success walked us through onboarding yesterday, and the new dashboard made it easy for my team to find risk accounts. The setup checklist saved us a ton of time.
I am really frustrated that the invoice export failed three times this morning and support has not replied to my ticket from Monday. We cannot close month-end until this works.
We imported 420 survey responses today. The upload finished in about six minutes, and I will check the tagging results with our ops lead tomorrow.
The sentiment summary is usually accurate and saves our managers time, but the mobile layout is cramped and I keep missing the filter button when reviewing comments on my phone.

action_item_intents: make filter button easier to use

feedback: Could you add a Slack alert when a new enterprise account leaves negative feedback? Our CSMs want to jump in before the renewal call.

action_item_intents: add slack alert for negative enterprise feedback

feedback: The product team answered my question eventually, but being bounced between chat, email, and my account manager was confusing. Please give customers one clear place to track support requests.

action_item_intents: provide one clear place to track support requests

feedback: I like the depth of the feedback table, but the theme editor is hard to discover. I only found bulk edit after a teammate sent me a screenshot.

action_item_intents: make theme editor and bulk edit easier to discover

feedback: Our renewal review went smoothly because Jenna pulled together the at-risk themes and action items before the meeting. We'd love the same report automatically sent every Friday.

action_item_intents: send the report automatically every friday
